title: Amtech A2970 1kg (40oz) Axe with fibreglass shaft
features: DURABLE: This sturdy 1kg (40oz) axe has a drop forged, heat treated head with a fibreglass shaft
RUBBER GRIP: Fitted with comfortable rubber grip, the axe is ideal for chopping and splitting wood
PRACTICAL SIZE: 40oz weight offers balance and control.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains Axe See more
